noteList.text: Once payment is confirmed, tickets will be issued within 2 hours

According to the airline's regulations, the tickets you have booked must be used in the order of the flight segments. Otherwise, the ticket fare, fuel surcharges, and government taxes will be recalculated based on the actual itinerary. If the recalculated amount exceeds the amount you have already paid for the tickets, you will be required to pay the difference. Additionally, any unused flight segments on the tickets will be considered invalid and cannot be used. The final decision will be subject to the approval of the operating carrier.
Book worry-free. What you see is what you pay.
Each piece cannot exceed 40 × 30 × 15 cm in size. Total dimensions (length + width + height) of each piece cannot exceed 85 cm.
It must be placed under the seat in front of you.
The total weight of the personal item and carry-on baggage cannot exceed 10 kg

formatted.sizeDesc: Overall size limit (length + width + height) per bag: 85 cm.

noteList.text: Each piece cannot exceed 56 × 36 × 23 cm in size. Total dimensions (length + width + height) of each piece cannot exceed 115 cm.

formatted.sizeDesc: Overall size limit (length + width + height) per bag: 115 cm.

noteList.text: 1 piece per person, 23 kg per piece.
Overall size limit (length + width + height) per bag: 158 cm.

noteList.text: Hanoi: Baggage will be checked through.

dataList.timeText: After departure or within 24 hours before departure

noteList.text: For cancellations, an additional $19.20 service fee will be charged by the ticket agency. Service fee will be charged per passenger.

dataList.timeText: After departure or within 24 hours before departure

noteList.text: For date/time changes, an additional $19.20 service fee will be charged by the ticket agency. Service fee will be charged per passenger. When date/time changes result in a new ticket price which is higher than the original ticket price, the difference must be paid. According to the airline's policy, once a ticket has been changed, the change fee that has already been paid is non-refundable if any further changes are made.

title.text: $68.00 per adult ticket will be charged for date/time changes within the same class made more than 24 hour(s) before the departure of the first segment. $81.00 per adult ticket will be charged for date/time changes within the same class made less than 24 hour(s) before the departure of the first segment. When a date/time change results in a flight ticket price difference, both the change fee and the price difference will be charged. For date/time changes, an additional $19.20 service fee will be charged by the ticket agency. Service fee will be charged per passenger.

noteList.text: If your flight is changed due to external factors (for example, if your flight is delayed or canceled) and you need to change your flight, please refer to the latest airline policies.

Change fees (within the same class) are charged when passengers apply for ticket changes voluntarily, and are only valid for ticket changes within the same class. These fees are airline fees and are not charged by Trip.com. Flight ticket changes may also incur additional charges due to differences in plane ticket prices.

The ticket policy is subject to the rules listed below, and these might differ from policies listed on the airline's website. Any cancellation or change requests must be made through Trip.com platforms or to our customer support.

flagInfoList.content: Each airline has different regulations on special baggage (such as musical instruments and sports equipment). Therefore, for baggage other than regular backpacks and suitcases, we recommend checking the baggage regulations on the airline's website or contacting our customer support before traveling.

noteList.text: Members of eligible frequent flyer programs can earn miles or points for this trip. These programs include, but are not limited to:
The airline miles or points you can earn for this trip may have been updated due to the price change. For the latest mileage details, please contact the airline if needed.

descriptionList: Each passenger can make one free cancellation, if they cancel their ticket before the first flight segment departs. For more details, check the Terms & Conditions below.

Each passenger can change their ticket once without paying any change fees if they change it before the first flight segment departs. The fare difference between the new and original tickets is not covered.

noticeList.notice: Valid before departure of the first flight. Not transferable to changed flights.

displayPolicyList.content: With TripFlex · EasyCancel & Change, you will get 100% of your ticket price refunded when canceling your flight before the departure of the first flight of your booking. Without TripFlex · EasyCancel & Change, the cancellation policy is as follows:
displayPolicyList.title: TripFlex · EasyCancel & Change added

displayPolicyList.content: With TripFlex · EasyCancel & Change, change fees and service fees will be covered when changing your flight before the departure of the first flight of your booking. Please note that any price difference resulting from the flight change will be at the passenger's expense. Without TripFlex · EasyCancel & Change, the change policy is as follows:
displayPolicyList.title: TripFlex · EasyCancel & Change added
